x._note: Disabled: X API now requires a paid plan with read credits. Set true once X_BEARER_TOKEN has credits. Priority: PRIMARY.

feeds.name: Roll Call
feeds._note: General Roll Call feed. Factba.se (the canonical Trump-statement DB, now part of Roll Call) does not expose a stable public RSS we could verify; if you obtain one, add it here as PRIMARY.

news_search._note: Each query runs against Google News RSS. These are inherently Trump-scoped.

polymarket._note: Public Polymarket API. Stock/crypto/M&A markets only, with probability >= min_probability and volume >= min_volume. Forwarded to the 'predictions' topic.

ratings._note: Analyst upgrades/downgrades & price targets via Financial Modeling Prep. Needs FMP_API_KEY (free); skipped automatically when no key. Forwarded to the 'ratings' topic.

sec_stakes._note: SEC EDGAR 13D/13G stake filings BY major holders (BlackRock, Vanguard, ...). Free, keyless, official. Seasonal (13G cluster in Feb). Forwarded to 'institutions'.

institutions_news._note: Year-round big-holder news (stocks + crypto) via Google News. Forwarded to 'institutions'.

kalshi._note: Public Kalshi market data (optional KALSHI_API_KEY). Stock/crypto/economy markets only; forwarded to the 'predictions' channel. Enable only with a separate predictions room (TELEGRAM_CHAT_PREDICTIONS).

usaspending._note: Official, free USAspending.gov API. Recent large federal CONTRACT awards to PUBLIC companies (e.g. defense deals). PRIMARY/factual. Tune min_amount to control volume.

reddit._note: SOCIAL_RUMOR early-warning layer. Disabled (too noisy — it surfaces Redditors' own stock chatter in Trump threads, not Trump's statements). To re-enable, set enabled=true; alerts will be capped at LOW and labelled unverified, firing only on genuine stock-call language.

youtube._note: Catches spoken/video remarks. Needs YOUTUBE_API_KEY (official Data API) to discover recent uploads; if youtube-transcript-api is installed, public captions are scanned too. Skipped automatically when no key is set.

gdelt._note: Free, keyless GDELT news index — multi-outlet corroboration. Works out of the box.
gdelt._note2: One combined query — GDELT rate-limits rapid back-to-back calls (HTTP 429).

queries.name: trump-stocks
queries.query: Trump (buy OR "go buy" OR bought OR shares OR stock OR "great company")

newsapi._note: Broad multi-outlet search via NewsAPI.org. Needs NEWSAPI_KEY (free tier); skipped automatically when no key is set.
queries: Trump (buy OR bought OR invest OR shares) (stock OR company)

truthsocial._note: Direct Truth Social RSS is Cloudflare-protected (403). We do NOT bypass it. His posts are monitored compliantly via the trumpstruth.org public archive in the rss section. If a compliant feed/API becomes available, set rss_url and enabled=true.
